# ERYON AI — Enterprise Software Development & AI Solutions

> ERYON AI is a premium enterprise software development agency based in New Delhi, India. We specialize in custom Web Development, AI/ML integrations, Mobile Apps, SaaS platforms, and Cloud DevOps solutions for modern enterprises worldwide.

## Company Overview

- **Name**: ERYON AI
- **Type**: Enterprise Software Development Agency
- **Location**: New Delhi, India
- **Website**: https://www.eryonai.com
- **Contact**: connect@eryonai.com | +91-82852-56571
- **Clients Served**: 80+ enterprise clients globally
- **Projects Delivered**: 150+
- **Client Satisfaction**: 98%
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/113904195
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/eryonai.solutions
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/eryon-ai

## Core Services

### Web Application Development
Custom enterprise web applications, admin dashboards, customer portals, vendor portals, analytics platforms, booking systems, marketplace platforms, and internal business systems using Next.js, React, and modern full-stack architectures.

### Mobile Application Development
Native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using React Native and Flutter, including enterprise mobility solutions, on-demand delivery apps, and consumer-facing applications.

### AI & Machine Learning Solutions
Intelligent automation, natural language processing, computer vision, predictive analytics, recommendation engines, AI chatbots, and custom ML model development integrated into enterprise workflows.

### Custom SaaS Platform Development
End-to-end SaaS product engineering including multi-tenant architectures, subscription billing, user management, API development, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

### Cloud DevOps & Infrastructure
Cloud-native architecture on AWS, GCP, and Azure. CI/CD pipelines, containerization with Docker and Kubernetes, infrastructure as code, monitoring, and 24/7 managed services.

### E-Commerce Solutions
Full-featured e-commerce platforms with product catalogs, payment processing, inventory management, order fulfillment, and analytics dashboards.

### CRM & ERP Systems
Custom CRM and ERP solutions for healthcare, education, real estate, manufacturing, and retail industries with role-based access control and real-time reporting.

### Cybersecurity Services
Application security audits, penetration testing, secure code reviews, compliance consulting (HIPAA, GDPR, SOC2), and security-first architecture design.

## Technology Stack

**Frontend**: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Angular, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
**Backend**: Node.js, Spring Boot, FastAPI, Python, Go
**Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase
**Cloud**: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Vercel
**DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Terraform
**AI/ML**: OpenAI, TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, Custom Models
**Mobile**: React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin

## Featured Case Studies

1. **Hospital HRMS** — Healthcare workforce management with HIPAA-ready compliance
2. **MarbleMart CRM** — Enterprise B2B CRM for marble manufacturers
3. **MarbleMart Web** — Corporate B2B catalog with 3D models
4. **EduNexus ERP** — School management system with multi-campus support
5. **Atelier E-Commerce** — Premium fashion e-commerce platform
6. **Realist CRM** — Luxury real estate property management
7. **CraveRush** — Food delivery platform with microservices architecture
8. **Gym Dashboard** — Fitness center admin panel with Stripe integration

## Why Choose ERYON AI

- **Enterprise-Grade Quality**: Production-ready code with comprehensive testing
- **Scalable Architecture**: Systems designed to handle millions of users
- **Security-First**: End-to-end encryption, RBAC, and compliance-ready
- **Agile Process**: Transparent sprints with weekly demos and continuous delivery
- **Global Experience**: Serving clients across India, USA, UK, UAE, Australia, and Canada
- **Post-Launch Support**: Ongoing maintenance, monitoring, and optimization

## Process

1. **Discovery & Planning** — Requirements gathering, technical assessment, project roadmap
2. **Design & Architecture** — UI/UX design, system architecture, database modeling
3. **Development & Testing** — Agile sprints, code reviews, automated testing
4. **Deployment & Launch** — CI/CD pipelines, staging environments, production deployment
5. **Maintenance & Growth** — Monitoring, optimization, feature enhancements
